q: Implementation and volume effects are excluded from this primitive.

envelope.interval_scope: research-input sensitivity with dataset anchors (l, n) held fixed

identity.title: All Other Miscellaneous Nonmetallic Mineral Product Manufacturing

lens.customer_and_revenue_model: Repeat sales of bagged, bulk, formulated, or specification-controlled mineral products to distributors, contractors, construction-material dealers, oilfield customers, and industrial users through purchase orders, dealer programs, and supply agreements.
lens.deviation_from_default: The catch-all code combines construction compounds, industrial minerals and proppants with decorative art goods and synthetic gemstones whose customers, production economics, and repeat behavior are too different for one coherent screen. The lens keeps repeat B2B industrial and building-product manufacturers and excludes decorative or jewelry-oriented producers; this narrowing follows business-model coherence rather than attractiveness.
lens.excluded_activities: Papier-mache statuary and related art goods, jewelry-oriented synthetic gemstones, episodic decorative retail manufacturers, on-site crushing, captive internal plants, shells, and non-control financing vehicles.
lens.included_activities: US lower-middle-market firms repeatedly manufacturing externally sold B2B industrial and building products within 327999, including dry-mix concrete, stucco, mica products, engineered proppants, synthetic stone for industrial use, and off-site reclaimed asphalt or concrete products.

a.bridge: BLS measures the broader NAICS 327 subsector rather than the narrowed 327999 population, and O*NET measures mixing/blending operators across industries rather than a wage-weighted task mix. I map the broad sector's office, planning, sales, purchasing, customer-service, recordkeeping, laboratory-interpretation, and portions of monitoring work to AI exposure while treating material handling, driving, setup, cleaning, maintenance, sampling, physical quality checks, and equipment intervention as minimally exposed. Broad NAICS 327 may overstate construction and heavy transport work for bagged specialty products and understate manual work in small decorative or niche plants, which are excluded from the lens.
caveats: The occupation mix is for broad NAICS 327, not this heterogeneous six-digit code.
No evidence identifies how much process monitoring is already automated in target firms.
The injected compensation ratio uses 2024 wages over 2022 receipts and is harmonized to the IPS basis as stated in the assignment.
a.change_evidence: A current six-digit, wage-weighted occupation extract for 327999 plus task-time studies stratified across dry-mix, stucco, mica, proppant, synthetic industrial stone, and recycled mineral-product plants would materially change the range.
a.rationale: Broader nonmetallic-mineral manufacturing has 33.97% of employment in production and 28.00% in transportation/material moving, compared with 8.04% in office and administrative support and 2.74% in business and financial operations. Mixing operators weigh inputs, read work orders, monitor and run machines, inspect product, record data, sample, clean, and clear jams. AI can address a meaningful information layer, but most core activity remains physical and already partly automated.

d5.bridge: Census construction spending, Census housing starts, EIA oil production, and Sika construction-market results measure major end markets or adjacent products, not constant-price, constant-quality demand for the narrowed 327999 basket. I combine currently soft construction and housing with stable-to-rising US oil output supporting proppants and eventual construction recovery. Nominal construction spending can overstate real quantity during inflation, oil production can diverge from proppant intensity, and Sika can gain share independently of market volume.
caveats: The narrowed basket is still heterogeneous and has no public quantity index.
Construction spending is nominal, while the primitive requires constant-price demand.
Oil output is an imperfect proxy for proppant demand because lateral length, sand loading, and well productivity change.
d5.change_evidence: Inflation-adjusted shipment volumes by 327999 product class, construction application, oilfield completion intensity, industrial customer, and domestic plant through 2031 would materially change the estimate.
d5.rationale: Dry mix, stucco, and related products depend heavily on construction and repair, while engineered proppants depend on drilling and completion intensity; mica and synthetic industrial products have separate cycles. May 2026 construction spending was below a year earlier and housing starts were sharply lower, while EIA forecasts US crude output rising from 13.6 million barrels per day in 2025 to 14.0 in 2027. A near-flat five-year base with a wide range is more defensible than a single end-market forecast.

caveats: The code is a residual category, so public aggregates can shift with classification practice.
The injected 72-firm count is a margin-bridged ESTIMATE rather than an observed EBITDA-band census.
The estimate depends materially on the coherence-based exclusion of decorative and jewelry-oriented businesses.
e.change_evidence: A firm-by-firm classification of the 327999 universe by product, customer type, repeat-revenue share, ownership, external sales, and normalized EBITDA would materially improve eligibility.
e.rationale: The official code includes many repeat B2B construction and industrial product manufacturers that fit the narrowed lens, but also decorative art goods, synthetic gemstones, captive operations, commodity sellers without meaningful outsourced-service characteristics, and firms whose customer relationships or economics are not independently transferable.

l.detail: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 327999 ($956,517,246) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 327999 ($5,426,133,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n.detail: margin 0.1465 (margins.json[32]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Paper/Forest Products EBITDA/Sales 14.65% (mid-range for wood/paper/plastics)); revenue/employee $459,803 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 327999); class <5: 91 firms, avg revenue/firm $662,429 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $97,046 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 46 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,836,283 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $269,015 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 38 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,100,658 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $747,246 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 55 firms, avg revenue/firm $17,543,655 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $2,570,145 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 17 firms, avg revenue/firm $46,232,353 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,773,040 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 24 firms, avg revenue/firm $139,029,458 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $20,367,816 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 72

caveats: Operator-required does not imply preservation of current staffing levels.
The excluded decorative segments may have different self-service and platform risks.
On-site mixing could substitute for selected dry products without eliminating the broader basket.
o.change_evidence: Customer procurement studies showing on-site mixing, backward integration, standardized direct ordering without supplier support, modular construction, and formulation changes that eliminate external processors would materially move this estimate.
o.rationale: The surviving basket consists of physical, formulated or specification-controlled materials that must be mixed, processed, tested, packaged or loaded, and delivered by an accountable manufacturer. Digital ordering and specification tools may remove transaction work, while contractors can mix some materials on site and customers can vertically integrate, but software alone cannot supply the product.

q.bridge: Sika reports margin, efficiency, and growth outcomes for a diversified global construction-chemicals portfolio, not discounted AI-benefit retention among narrowed 327999 firms. I use improved material margin amid weak organic demand and a quantified efficiency program as evidence that differentiated product makers can retain some operational gains, then haircut for distributor and contractor bargaining, formula transparency, bid competition, commodity inputs, and product substitutes. A branded global supplier likely retains more than a small undifferentiated dry-mix producer.
caveats: Sika's portfolio extends far beyond the included NAICS activities.
Pricing structure varies between bagged retail construction compounds, bulk proppants, and qualified industrial products.
Implementation and volume effects are excluded from this primitive.
q.change_evidence: Anonymized realized-price, rebate, bid, gross-margin, and renewal data from included firms before and after automation, segmented by product and channel, would materially move retention.
q.rationale: Products are sold per bag, ton, batch, or specification rather than billed as labor hours, so internal labor savings are not automatically passed through. Specialty formulations, approvals, service, logistics, and consistent quality support retention; transparent material costs, local competitors, powerful channels, rebids, and excess capacity drive sharing over five years.

rho.bridge: Sika's digital-transformation and efficiency program covers a global, large-scale construction-chemicals company, not LMM firms in narrowed 327999. Its stated production-network, organizational, and value-chain digitization program demonstrates technical and operational implementability in adjacent products. Scaling that evidence down may overstate small firms' integration capacity, while their simpler workflows may make packaged administrative tools easier to adopt.
caveats: Sika is much larger and more digitally mature than the target firms.
Implementation varies sharply across the included product categories.
rho.change_evidence: Verified labor-hour, error, downtime, and quality results from 10-15 LMM dry-mix, stucco, proppant, mica, and recycled-material producers using AI in office and plant workflows for at least 12 months would materially move implementation.
rho.rationale: Order entry, specification matching, quote support, production and delivery scheduling, purchasing, documentation, service, maintenance triage, and management reporting are implementable with human review. Plant-control changes face legacy integration, sparse data, worker safety, formulation liability, environmental controls, and customer qualification constraints.

s5.bridge: BizBuySell reports sales of small manufacturers across industries and mostly below the target EBITDA band, while Census owner-age data are economy-wide and Saint-Gobain's 2025 Interstar acquisition is one strategic construction-chemicals transaction rather than an industry rate. Together they establish broad manufacturing liquidity, succession context, and strategic interest in adjacent formulated materials. Marketplace selection can overstate transfer likelihood; confidential strategic deals can understate it; a single acquisition cannot identify frequency.
caveats: No source measures a five-year control-transfer probability for this code.
Broker listings skew smaller, and the strategic acquisition is not representative.
Economy-wide owner age does not measure sale intent.
s5.change_evidence: Five years of closed transactions mapped to the narrowed 327999 product set from GF Data, DealStats, PitchBook, SBA lending, environmental permit transfers, and strategic buyer disclosures, divided by the eligible-firm population, would materially change the range.
s5.rationale: Niche formulation, local distribution, customer qualification, and specialty product lines can be transferable and attractive to strategic consolidators. Availability is reduced by environmental and product liabilities, specialized plants, family ownership, cyclicality, and the need to distinguish operating-company sales from asset liquidations or internal reorganizations.

principal_driver: Repeat specification-controlled B2B products create automatable information workflows while preserving physical operator accountability.
principal_weakness: The catch-all code's product and end-market heterogeneity makes aggregate evidence fragile and acquisition supply hard to characterize.
